description: Maps a Container status to the Yard Zone categories it may sit in. The FIRST allowed category is the recommended target; a container parked outside ALL allowed categories shows up in the 'needs move' monitor list.

fields.description: The raw Container.status this rule governs.
fields.label: Container Status
fields.options:
Booked
Available
Gate_In
Inspecting
Needs_Cleaning
Pending_Cleaning
Cleaning_In_Progress
Cleaning_Completed
Pending_Survey
Survey_In_Progress
Awaiting_MR_Approval
Repair_In_Progress
Awaiting_Recleaning_Approval
Recleaning_In_Progress
Released_Pending_Pickup
Gate_Out

fields.description: Yard categories a container in this status may sit in (first = recommended target). Leave empty when the container is not placeable in the yard (e.g. pre-arrival / gated out).
fields.label: Allowed Yard Categories

name: Yard Placement Rule
